Why Trust Us

We Don't Just
Sell It. We Run It.

LIVE PROOF OF CONCEPT

We Don't Just Sell It. We Run It.

Built By Blue Collar. For Blue Collar.

We run a mobile mechanic operation in Fort Worth, TX. We walked that mile. We know what it costs to miss a call under a car, watch a lead go cold, and lose a job to a competitor who just answered their phone. You're not buying something untested — you're buying the exact system we use every day to run our own shop.

  • ✓AI Service Coordinator running live on our own mobile mechanic shop — every call, every day
  • ✓Every call answered 24/7 in a natural voice — sounds like a real person
  • ✓SMS follow-up firing automatically for every missed call and booking
  • ✓Social media posting daily — zero human involvement after setup
  • ✓Every lead logged to Google Sheets — nothing falls through the cracks
